Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-28387 affecting package openssl for versions less than 3.3.7-2
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-28387 affecting package openssl for versions less than 3.3.7-2. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package openssl is earlier than 3.3.7-2, affected by CVE-2026-28387
